chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-285 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 15-09-2025 Mr. Farhat Ali Bugti, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, assisted by Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, Deputy Prosecutor General. -------- Through the instant petition the petitioner has claimed the following relief:- a. That this Honorable Court may be pleased to direct respondents No.2 to 6 not to lodge false FIRs against petitioner’s party and not to issue threats of implicating them in series of false criminal cases. b. To call and direct respondents No.2 to 6 to appear before this Honorable court and to file undertakings that they will not lodge FIRs and cause any sort of harassment to the petitioner and her family members. c. To direct official respondents No.7 to 9 to provide full legal protection to the lives and property of the petitioner and her other family members in accordance with law as petitioner party apprehend great danger to their lives and property at the hnds of respondents No.2 to 6. When confronted as to how this petition is maintainable that no FIR has been registered against the petitioner herself and she has sought indirect relief in favor of her relatives and petitioner did not fall within the definition of aggrieved person as defined under Article 199 of the Constitution. Learned counsel submits that the petitioner is under huge harassment at the hands of police and they off and on raid her house with ulterior motive.

When confronted as to how this petition is maintainable that no FIR has been registered against the petitioner herself and she has sought indirect relief in favor of her relatives and petitioner did not fall within the definition of aggrieved person as defined under Article 199 of the Constitution. Learned counsel submits that the petitioner is under huge harassment at the hands of police and they off and on raid her house with ulterior motive. The official respondents have filed their replies wherein they admitted that there is a dispute over the land between Bangulani and Dahani community and they are striving hard to maintain law and order situation in the area. However, they contended that the close relative of petitioner namely Waheed s/o Gul Hassan Bangulani is nominated in FIR u/s 395, 396 PPC and police raided house to apprehend said accused, the women folk of the village offer resistance, therefore, they are unable to apprehend proclaimed offender. In the given situation the petitioner if feels aggrieved of any action on the part of police, she may approach the SHO police station Punhu Bhatti who shall redress her grievance. However, the police is at liberty to take serious efforts for the arrest of the absconding accused by following the procedure laid down under the law. The petition stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
